title: NPC Role (Fabula Ultima world)
note: generate:character table for the engine's auto-fire NEW-CHARACTER hook (generators_map.character, mode conjunction = also runs the AC Character Crafter). Roll a role, then flesh the NPC as a native of setting-canon.md via interpretation.md: a want, a faction/place, and a Bond hook to a PC.

entries.value: Commoner — farmer, fisher, laborer, or innkeeper
Artisan or craftsperson — smith, tailor, apothecary
Priest, monk, or spiritist of a local faith
Outcast, criminal, or rebel with a cause
Power-broker — warlord, high priest, guildmaster, or a monster in human guise
